user_query: I want to plan a weekend getaway with my family and attend a football match. Fetch the daily betting tips and coupons from Daily Betting Tips API. Also, provide me with the upcoming matches and their odds from the Live Sports Odds API.

TaskList.description: Fetch the daily betting tips and coupons.
Fetch upcoming matches and their odds.
Plan the family getaway based on the match schedule and the odds provided.
